project:
xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
4.0.0
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-parent 3.4.1
com.example car-management-system 1.0.0 Car Sales, Maintenance and Spare Parts Management System
A comprehensive backend system for managing car sales, maintenance records, spare parts inventory, and customer data. Built with Spring Boot, MongoDB, JWT, and RabbitMQ.
17 0.12.6 3.2.1 2.8.3
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-web
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-validation
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-actuator
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-security
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-amqp
io.jsonwebtoken jjwt-api ${jjwt.version}
io.jsonwebtoken jjwt-impl ${jjwt.version} runtime
io.jsonwebtoken jjwt-jackson ${jjwt.version} runtime
org.modelmapper modelmapper ${modelmapper.version}
org.springdoc springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui ${springdoc.version}
com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype jackson-datatype-jsr310
org.projectlombok lombok true
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-starter-test test
org.springframework.security spring-security-test test
org.springframework.amqp spring-rabbit-test test
org.springframework.boot spring-boot-maven-plugin
org.projectlombok lombok
